commands.repair_reason: Human review remains needed because the external proof gate is failing and the auth-provider change should not be merged until proof and checks are clear.; Cleared: The diff touches secrets/auth lookup code but adds no dependencies, workflows, lockfiles, downloads, lifecycle hooks, or broader secret access. commands.review_summary:
The PR removes an eager provider env-var candidate export, passes plugin metadata snapshots through auth env-var alias resolution, tightens default snapshot matching, and adds provider env-var regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +60. Total +84 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves a metadata snapshot and then calls alias resolution without passing it, so a second snapshot lookup/load path is reachable. I did not run the benchmark in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review remains needed because the external proof gate is failing and the auth-provider change should not be merged until proof and checks are clear.
